heading: Geographically disadvantaged farmers and ranchers
label: 8792 Geographically disadvantaged farmers and ranchers

Effective DateEnactment of this section and repeal of by effective , the date of enactment of , see , set out as a note under .Pub. L. 110–234Pub. L. 110–246Pub. L. 110–234section 4 of Pub. L. 110–246section 8701 of this titleMay 22, 2008

children.heading: Agricultural commodity
children.label: 1 Agricultural commodity
children.text: The term “agricultural commodity” has the meaning given the term in .section 5602 of this title

children.heading: Geographically disadvantaged farmer or rancher
children.label: 2 Geographically disadvantaged farmer or rancher
children.text: The term “geographically disadvantaged farmer or rancher” has the meaning given the term in section 10906(a) of the Farm Security and Rural Investment Act of 2002 ( note; ).7 U.S.C. 2204Public Law 107–171

children.heading: Authorization
children.label: b Authorization
children.text: Subject to the availability of funds under subsection (d), the Secretary may provide geographically disadvantaged farmers or ranchers direct reimbursement payments for activities described in subsection (c).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subject to paragraphs (2) and (3), the Secretary may provide direct reimbursement payments to a geographically disadvantaged farmer or rancher to transport an agricultural commodity, or inputs used to produce an agricultural commodity, during a fiscal year.

children.heading: Proof of eligibility
children.label: 2 Proof of eligibility
children.text: To be eligible to receive assistance under paragraph (1), a geographically disadvantaged farmer or rancher shall demonstrate to the Secretary that transportation of the agricultural commodity or inputs occurred over a distance of more than 30 miles, as determined by the Secretary.

children.label: i
children.text: the amount of costs incurred by the geographically disadvantaged farmer or rancher for transportation of the agricultural commodity or inputs during the fiscal year; and

children.label: I
children.text: the percentage of the allowance for that fiscal year under for Federal employees stationed in Alaska and Hawaii; orsection 5941 of title 5

children.label: II
children.text: in the case of an insular area (as defined in ), a comparable percentage of the allowance for the fiscal year, as determined by the Secretary.section 3103 of this title

children.heading: Limitation
children.label: B Limitation
children.text: The total amount of direct reimbursement payments provided by the Secretary under this section shall not exceed $15,000,000 for a fiscal year.

children.heading: Authorization of appropriations
children.label: d Authorization of appropriations
children.text: There are authorized to be appropriated such sums as are necessary to carry out this section for fiscal year 2009 and each succeeding fiscal year.
